name: Kolokithokeftethes (Squash Croquettes or Pat
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kefalotiri cheese, grated OR 1 cup Parmesan cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the squash.
2. Boil in lightly salted water until soft; drain well.
3. Mash and set aside.
4. Melt the butter in a pan, and saute the onions until limp and golden but not browned.
5. Add onion, cheese, bread crumbs, parsley, eggs, and salt & pepper to the squash.
6. Mix well. If mixture is too soft, add more bread crumbs.
7. Let it stand for 10 minutes.
8. Shape into croquettes or patties.
9. Roll in flour.
10. Fry until golden.
